category_sources: Official mm-common README describes build infrastructure and utilities for GNOME C++ binding libraries.
source_facts.description: Build utilities for C++ interfaces of GTK+ and GNOME packages.
display_name_sources: Official GNOME GitLab repository is named mm-common.
docs_sources: Official GNOME GitLab README is the available official documentation surface for mm-common.
repo_sources: GNOME GitLab hosts the upstream project repository.
Official GNOME project README lists the Git repository as https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/mm-common.
tags_sources: Official README describes GNOME C++ binding build infrastructure.
source_facts.description identifies GTK+ and GNOME C++ interface build utilities.
